title: In just over a week, MU generated nearly a million in profit for me. Here is how I did it.
author: Angela-Cole
selftext:
Called $MU a few days agogot a lot of disagreement here

Some people thought it was overextendedSome DMs asked for my reasoning

Fast forward to now:MU pushed again today (+7.5%), and this positionalone is getting close to a 7-figure gain

Not saying this to brag just shows how different the same chart canlook depending on how you read it

My thesis was simple:strong continuation after pullbacksbuyers clearly defending levelsmomentum > noise

Shared this with a few people privately,glad some of them caught the move too

Now I’m actually looking at the opposite side on a few namespotential short setups forming

Curious if anyone here is also watching for short opportunities right now?

Always interested in how others approach entries, risk, and timingfeel free to DM if you’re actively trading and want to exchange ideas
